name: Dance Master Mat
description: Dance Master Mat is a wonderful idol draft live dance free online game. Dance moves need to be trained before the live broadcast. The more wonderful dance moves in the live broadcast room, the more attractive the audience will be. Come and join us, reward your favorite idol, and help him become Top 1.
